name: King-Hypercount-V1.docx
content:
What is the King Hypercount high-speed tablet counting machine?

The King Hypercount is C.E. King’s highest-speed automatic tablet and capsule counting machine, designed for large-scale pharmaceutical and nutraceutical production environments requiring maximum throughput.

Details

  • Designed for high-speed, high-volume production lines
  • Counts tablets, capsules, caplets, and softgels with precision accuracy
  • Multi-channel counting technology for rapid throughput
  • Touchscreen HMI interface with recipe storage and batch management
  • Built for integration into complete packaging lines with upstream and downstream equipment
  • CE marked and manufactured within ISO 9001:2015 quality management systems
  • Suitable for pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, and supplement industries
  • For detailed specifications, output rates, and pricing, contact sales@ceking.com
  • The Hypercount sits above the Technocount range (T8, T12, T16, T24) in the product hierarchy for customers needing the fastest counting speeds
  • Spare parts and technical support available through the C.E. King service team

C.E. King Automatic Counting Machines
